from cadquery import Workplane

# Diamond engagement ring with cylindrical band and spherical diamond
# Key dimensions: band radius 10mm, band height 2mm, diamond radius 3mm

band = (Workplane("XY")
    .cylinder(10, 2)
)

diamond = (Workplane("XY")
    .sphere(3)
    .translate(0, 0, 2.5)
)

prong1 = (Workplane("XY")
    .cylinder(0.5, 4)
    .translate(2, 0, 2)
)

prong2 = (Workplane("XY")
    .cylinder(0.5, 4)
    .translate(-2, 0, 2)
)

prong3 = (Workplane("XY")
    .cylinder(0.5, 4)
    .tr...
